panels.description: Wide shot: The Time Traveler stands in a lush, futuristic garden, gesturing toward a group of frail, ethereal, exquisite creatures with soft features. The atmosphere is bright and dreamlike.

bubbles.text: Then he turned to the two others and spoke in a strange, liquid tongue.

panels.description: Medium shot: The Traveler looking uneasy as small, soft, childlike hands feel his shoulders and the metal of the Time Machine. He looks down at them with a mix of intrigue and slight concern.

bubbles.text: They looked so frail I could fling them about like ninepins... but I made a sudden motion when their hands touched the machine.

panels.description: Close up: The Traveler's hand unscrewing a lever from the Time Machine. He looks focused and protective of his only means of escape.

bubbles.text: I unscrewed the levers... then I pointed to the sun to communicate.

panels.description: Medium close-up: The Traveler's face showing deep disappointment and contemplation as he realizes the creatures might not be as intellectually advanced as he hoped.

bubbles.text: Were these creatures fools? A flow of disappointment rushed across my mind.

panels.description: Dynamic medium shot: The creatures laughing and showering the Traveler with colorful, exotic flowers. He looks surprised and slightly overwhelmed by their joyful reception.
Wide shot: The Traveler walking toward a massive, grey, fretted stone edifice. In the foreground, a large, enigmatic white marble sphinx watches him with a fixed, stone smile.

bubbles.text: I was led past the sphinx... towards a vast grey edifice.
